name: Cheddar Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature before beginning.
2. In a medium mixing bowl, beat the butter until fluffy using an electric mixer.
3. Gradually add the grated Cheddar and Romano cheese, beating continuously until well combined.
4. Stir in the Worcestershire sauce, garlic powder, and paprika.
5. Spread the mixture onto bread slices. Rye, sourdough, or regular French bread are good options.
6. Toast the bread under a broiler until hot.
